title: Protector
description:
[gold]Osty[/gold] deals 10 damage.
Deals additional damage equal to [gold]Osty's[/gold] [gold]Max HP[/gold].
upgraded_description:
[gold]Osty[/gold] deals 15 damage.
Deals additional damage equal to [gold]Osty's[/gold] [gold]Max HP[/gold].
notes: Requires Osty to be alive to deal damage. Damage scales with Osty's Max HP.
